item.title: Aussie internationals overlooked in Hundred auction but Matt Short gets snapped up late
item.description: Unlike their female counterparts, Australia’s cricket men weren’t in demand.

item.title: Victorian dad wins $50 million Powerball jackpot while watching the AFL on his couch
item.description: He was on his couch watching AFL when the email rolled in.

item.title: Mel Schilling cancer diagnosis: TV star and dating coach reveals there’s nothing left for doctors to do in sad health update
item.description: ‘My light is starting to fade — and quickly.’

item.title: Nicole Kidman, Keith Urban: The Practical Magic 2 star addresses divorce for the first time
item.description: The Australian actress and country music singer finalised their divorce in January after 19 years of marriage.

item.title: Australian Idol 2026: Meet the singers who have secured a spot in this year’s Top 12
item.description: The judges have chosen and now the contestants are fighting to keep their dreams alive.

item.title: Noma’s Michelin-star chef Rene Redzepi steps back after admitting past mistreatment of staff
item.description: The star chef behind the world-renowned restaurant said he is leaving daily operations ‘effective immediately’.

item.title: Bluesfest Byron Bay cancelled: Major music festival announces ‘difficult decision’ weeks before it was due to take place
item.description: Thousands of people were just weeks out from heading to Bluesfest before getting the bad news on Friday.

item.title: Spycops scandal: Women share horror of 20-year deception by undercover police officer
item.description: For decades, ‘James’ built intimate relationships under a false identity. Now the women involved are revealing the devastating truth behind a secret police operation.

item.title: ‘Real anxiety in the community’: Fuel uncertainty hits regional families and farms - and most likely family dinner tables
item.description: Farmers warn they may be unable to plant or harvest and one servo owner says the situation is ‘day‑to‑day’.

item.title: Twist for Sydney man who was accused over threat to kidnap Prime Minister Anthony Albanese
item.description: The 27-year-old is also accused of performing an offensive salute.

item.title: Melbourne: World's Best City is also it's biggest property bargain
item.description: Is a harbour view really worth an extra $600,000 to buyers?

item.title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabian Formula 1 Grand Prix events set to be cancelled due to Middle East war
item.description: A major broadcaster believes there are no options and the decision will be made public on Sunday night.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Trump issues chilling threat to Iran as Hezbollah vows to fight ‘existential battle’
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Chris Waller does it again as Lazzura takes out Coolmore Classic
item.description: The master trainer captured his fourth-straight Classic with victory at Rosehill.

item.title: The International Criminal Court will likely not prosecute anyone over the war in Iran and would struggle to even if it did
item.description: Despite more than 1000 civilians already being killed, the ICC will likely not ever prosecute any war crimes.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Aussie political influencer Drew Pavlou who got the attention of Donald Trump
item.description: This week Drew Pavlou got the US president to call Australia’s Prime Minister about the plight of the Iranian women’s football team.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Trump raises glaring question about Iran’s new supreme leader
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Dramatic manhunt for alleged killer unfolds ahead of third round at The Players Championship
item.description: Players and fans arrived just as police were closing in on the suspect after an overnight chase.

item.title: Formula 1 races in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia cancelled: ‘Incredibly important’
item.description: The official announcement has left a cloud over the 2026 season.

item.title: 7NEWS Kiss and Kill: Anthony Eriksen fights 26-year sentence over Lisa Fenwick’s murder, claims he was sleepwalking
item.description: Lisa Fenwick was found on the bedroom floor of her apartment with dozens of stab wounds.

item.title: Underage Roblox accounts sold online allow predators to bypass safety measures protecting young gamers
item.description: One alleged Australian predator user has been charged with 596 child abuse-related offences.

item.title: Hundreds infected with norovirus on Star Princess cruise in the Caribbean
item.description: Almost one in 10 people aboard the cruise in the Caribbean fell ill.

item.title: Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris fail to start at Chinese Grand Prix as Kimi Antonelli fulfills F1 dream
item.description: The Australian and his McLaren teammate were both removed from grid just before lights out.

item.title: US flag flies over Venezuela for first time since 2019, two months after capture of President Nicolas Maduro
item.description: ‘This is positive; this is another step.’

item.title: Punch the monkey is finally making friends and fitting in
item.description: ‘Now he’s communicating with other monkeys and it’s great to see him reaching those milestones.’

item.title: Usman Khawaja’s first-class career ended without even playing as Queensland miss out on Sheffield Shield final
item.description: The retired Test opener has bid farewell from home as he awaits the start of a new chapter.

item.title: Oscars host Conan O’Brien shocks with ‘paedophile’ joke and roasts Timothee Chalamet in opening monologue
item.description: The comedian took no prisoners as he roasted the biggest names in Hollywood and beyond.

item.title: McLaren point the finger at Mercedes HPP after Oscar Piastri’s double disaster to start 2026 F1 season
item.description: An initial report has muddied the waters as the Aussie struggles with a situation ‘difficult to process’.

item.title: Oscars 2026 winners list: All the victors at the 98th Academy Awards
item.description: See who won big at Hollywood’s night of nights.

item.title: Australian travellers should not transit or layover in Middle East countries marked with ‘Do Not Travel’ warning, government says
item.description: Smartraveller has clarified its warning for those planning on flying through the dangerous region.

item.title: Oscars pay tribute to Rob Reiner, Catherine O’Hara and Diane Keaton in emotional In Memoriam segment
item.description: ‘All we can say is “buddy, what fun we had storming the castle”.’

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle slam new claims made by author Tom Bower in new book
item.description: The Duke of Sussex has dismissed shock allegations in a new biography written about him.

item.title: Guzman y Gomez co-CEO Hilton Brett cuts duties ahead of kidney transplant
item.description: Guzman y Gomez co-chief executive Hilton Brett will cut his workload as he prepares for a kidney transplant later this year, leaving a question mark over the company’s leadership in Australia.

item.title: Oscars 2026: Best and worst moments from the Academy Awards as Timothee Chalamet roasted by Conan O’Brien
item.description: Conan O’Brien returned for a second year to host Hollywood’s biggest night.

item.title: Etiquette expert dissects Queen Mary’s behaviour during visit Down Under
item.description: The Australian-born Queen’s behaviour during her trip back to her homeland may have taken some people by surprise.

item.title: Ozempic, Wegovy maker Novo Nordisk to expand weight loss jab testing on kids
item.description: Novo Nordisk plans to trial its blockbuster drug on overweight teenagers in the Pacific, reflecting a shift underway in global health towards drugs that suppress appetite.

item.title: Looksmaxxing: Brisbane duo Androgenic and Nocturnal Kent take 7NEWS inside the internet’s latest self-help fad
item.description: ‘I’m just improving myself. You know, is somebody who goes to work every day or seeking a job insecure as well?’

item.title: Richmond zeroing in on Gosch’s Paddock as new training base while Punt Road Oval is redeveloped
item.description: The Tigers will need a new home later this year when Punt Road Oval is torn up.

item.title: Astron at Quinns Rocks runs out of unleaded petrol after customer fills jerry cans with $500 worth of fuel
item.description: A fuel shop attendant says tougher fuel limits are needed after a customer filled jerry cans with hundreds of dollars worth of petrol, emptying the service station.

item.title: NRL great Luke Keary tips Manly to make early move on under-fire coach Anthony Seibold
item.description: ‘The way they finished last year, and having the whole off season to make changes ... has anything changed?’

item.title: Australian children could be prescribed weight loss drugs like Wegovy to combat obesity
item.description: The controversial move has divided experts.

item.title: Fremantle coach Justin Longmuir slammed for ‘nonsensical’ comment about Opening Round
item.description: ‘When are they going to stop whinging?’

item.description: The sanction comes six weeks after he branded the International Tennis Integrity Agency ‘corrupt’.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Sri Lanka moves to four day work week as fuel shortage strikes
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Iran suddenly on brink of sensational exit from World Cup as Mexico relocation blocked
item.description: Talks have taken a turn with FIFA’s hard-line public stance increasing the likelihood of a late withdrawal.

item.title: Rising household bills are reshaping how Australians spend, save and socialise
item.description: For those looking to reduce the stress of monthly bills, there are practical steps worth considering.

item.title: Luke Hodge exasperated as damning footage exposes ‘passive’ Carlton vice-captain Jacob Weitering
item.description: ‘He went in there to do his own job, and anything outside of that it was non-existent. For God’s sake, show some passion.’

item.title: Matildas hero Sam Kerr shares details of coach chat during Asian Cup semi-final thriller against China
item.description: The Matildas superstar has revealed exactly what she said to the boss ... but he was having none of it.

item.title: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese calls an emergency national cabinet meeting as the fuel crisis deepens
item.description: Global supply pressures amid the war in Iran are now colliding with surging demand at home.

item.title: Three more men wanted for questioning over alleged mistaken kidnapping and murder of Sydney grandfather Chris Baghsarian
item.description: The footage shows three men walking towards a semi-rural property which police later raided.

item.title: Aussie gold medallist Jack Anstey calls out Australian Athletics selection policy after missing world indoor championships team
item.description: The 28-year-old ‘doesn’t usually speak up about things like this’ but felt compelled to make a statement.

item.title: Burpengary crash: Two more men charged after wrong-way stolen truck caused fatal head-on crash on Bruce Highway
item.description: Police say a stolen vehicle was being followed moments before the high-speed collision killed a 26-year-old driver.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz debuts kangaroo tattoo with map of Australia to commemorate Melbourne triumph
item.description: The world No.1’s distinctive new ink has been spotted six weeks after lifting the trophy.

item.title: AFL grand final entertainment: Bid for Aussie acts to take centre stage at MCG
item.description: Global stars such as KISS, Katy Perry and Snoop Dogg have taken top billing in recent years.

item.title: Bulldogs wear pointed ‘we before me’ T-shirt as coach Cameron Ciraldo calls out Bronson Xerri’s attitude
item.description: The centre has been challenged to fix his attitude - even if there’s a real chance he only lasts another ‘10 days’ at the club.

item.title: New WA coach Beau Casson lifts lid on explosive Cam Green report
item.description: An interview with the Australian Test star lasted just 20 seconds before he reportedly ‘stormed off in a huff’.

item.title: AFL cultural diversity ambassador Jayden Nguyen reveals father’s ‘shock’ at decision to pursue footy career
item.description: The AFL’s first and only Vietnamese player had to ‘say it again’ when he told his dad.

item.title: Australian scientists develop world-first quantum battery
item.description: The CSIRO says quantum EV batteries could one day charge more quickly than the time it takes to refuel a petrol or diesel car.

item.title: Pilot escapes injury after light plane crashes and flips in Charters Towers, Queensland
item.description: ‘I was a bit cautious running over there thinking what am I running into here.’

item.title: Mental health concerns raised for Blake Seers after murder charges over deaths of partner Kate Paterson and baby in Logan
item.description: Police allege the 38-year-old fled the home where the bodies were later found before being hit by a car.

item.title: Bjorn Baker confirms ‘risky’ move for Warwoven ahead of Golden Slipper
item.description: The blinkers will go on the leading contender as jockey Rachel King chases history.

item.title: Teenager Jack Thatcher dies after horror fall at Mt Beerwah, Sunshine Coast
item.description: 18-year-old Jack Thatcher also succumbed to his injuries three days after a dramatic rescue.

item.title: "Be a good Australian" and stop panic buying fuel, warns PM
item.description: Fuel is still being safely imported to Australia, but panic buying has affected domestic supply – and the PM has warned Aussies to knock it off.

item.title: Towering Richmond midfielder Josh Smillie grows three centimetres during injury battle
item.description: The on-baller is now effectively the height of a ruck after shooting up several centimetres since being drafted.

item.title: One Nation leader Pauline Hanson targets ‘forgotten South Australians’ amid warnings her immigration claims are misleading
item.description: ‘People want change … people want a decent standard of living and a way of life.’

item.title: Daniel James Holdom who murdered mother, dumped toddler in suitcase fights to shorten life sentence
item.description: ‘He deserves to spend every remaining day of his life in prison for what he did to our family.’

item.title: Bobby Hill on verge of return to Collingwood after months-long absence
item.description: The Norm Smith medallist has turned a corner as he continues to deal with a delicate personal situation.

item.title: Want to win a luxury home? How to enter the My Reno Rules draw
item.description: Adrian Portelli: Billionaire opens multi-million home giveaway

item.title: Video of Gold Coast band Forever on High drummer wiping out on canal pontoon goes viral
item.description: ‘Time for a new drummer.’

item.title: Witness describes moment gunman opens fire on Altona North cafe, Melbourne
item.description: A sudden scramble erupted as the gunman shot indiscriminately into a crowd.

item.title: Wild road rage clash erupts on Adelaide’s busy South Road as two drivers punch on
item.description: Video captured the two drivers trading blows in the middle of the road.

item.title: Soaring petrol prices amid Middle East conflict sparking fuel shortages drives thousands back to public transport
item.description: New figures reveal a massive shift in how we're getting to work, with one service breaking records.

item.title: Tasmania identify Geelong veteran Tom Stewart as type of player they will go after ahead of AFL inception
item.description: ‘Could he go down to Tasmania with a bigger salary cap and cash in?’

item.title: Former NRL star Curtis Scott released on bail after alleged violent attack at SCG
item.description: The 28-year-old spent the night behind bars, while his mother has also been charged for her role in the incident.

item.title: Petrol theft surges 30 per cent as South Australia police scale back investigations
item.description: Police have made a controversial decision that's left service stations furious.

item.title: Recall issued for Biocheese Pty Ltd’s Cheddar Shred 200g amid undeclared allergen
item.description: The alert has been issued nationally for the popular vegan product.

item.title: 2027 BMW i3 EV sedan revealed with up to 900km of range
item.description: The BMW i3 is an electric counterpart to the 3 Series and a platform-mate to the Neue Klasse iX3, with new underpinnings and technology... and a very long range.

item.title: Hate chrome? BMW is ditching it for the Neue Klasse era
item.description: BMW’s Neue Klasse models will farewell chrome in favour of illuminated design features, including glowing kidney grilles.

item.title: Nick Riewoldt says Collingwood should rest Scott Pendlebury for either Anzac Day or Hawthorn clash ahead of games record
item.description: The fairytale timing for the Collingwood champion’s record-breaking game ‘should’ be throw out.

item.title: Family claims their son living with autism was allegedly assaulted and neglected at NDIS supported home in West Australia
item.description: His mum went to check on him at the ‘safe’ property, but what she found has left her devastated.

item.title: World leaders to call on Iran to open Strait of Hormuz amid fuel shortages as Israel reports more attacks on key leaders
item.description: The blockage of the Strait of Hormuz has led to fuel shortages and price rises globally.

item.title: 'No mould, no mildew': Could this be the world's healthiest house?
item.description: That is the intention behind the newly built home Casa Terra.

item.title: Women's soccer team arrive back in war-torn Iran from Australia
item.description: State media had branded the women ‘wartime traitors’.

item.title: 2026 Mahindra Scorpio review
item.description: This updated affordable diesel off-road SUV has scored safety tech and seven seats, and it’s arguably one of the best value vehicles in Australia.
